mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_file_node WHERE bundle_id = #{bundleId} ORDER BY node_type ASC, sort_order ASC, name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_file_node (bundle_id, parent_id, name, node_type, file_path, file_size, sort_order) VALUES (#{bundleId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{nodeType}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{sortOrder})
